name: analysis_visualization
description: Open analysis and visualization stage contract for traceable data analysis, plotting, and figure evidence.
intent: Analyze simulation outputs or user-provided data and create figures while preserving data, script, environment, figure, and claim lineage.
handoff_notes: Record which data were analyzed, which scripts or helpers were used, which figures were produced, and which conclusions are supported.
risk_notes: Do not force built-in parsers or present incomplete figures as final evidence when a recorded custom script is more appropriate.
